title: SSA FY2025 Congressional Justification — Extracted Text (DDS budget & work-years)
description: Markdown text extracted from SSA's FY2025 Congressional Justification of Estimates for Appropriations Committees (FY25-JEAC.pdf): budget authority, LAE, program-integrity funding, agency-wide and DDS work-year allocations (DDS = 13,555 work-years in FY2025), and performance tables. The authoritative source establishing that DDS funding is published at the NATIONAL level only — no per-state DDS budget allocations appear in the CJ (a key 'structurally unavailable' finding for state-level DDS budgets).
geographic_coverage: National (United States); no per-state DDS budget breakdown

source.title: FY 2025 Congressional Justification (Justification of Estimates for Appropriations Committees, FY25-JEAC.pdf)

notes: Computed: text extracted via Firecrawl from the published FY25 CJ PDF (large, ~799–811 KB markdown); narrative + budget tables, not a tidy machine table, so no per-column schema. Source URL is the exact PDF from cj-fy25.source.txt. KEY FINDING (per methodology.md and FETCH_REPORT.md): SSA's CJ publishes DDS funding nationally only (FY25: 13,555 work-years, ~$2.6B); per-state DDS budget allocations are not in any public CJ/annual-report document — treat state-level DDS budget cells as 'Structurally unavailable' (would require a federal FOIA).
